sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7980" key="a)ndroka/praina" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρο-κάπραινα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7980.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lewd woman, wanton,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:17D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
